description: Time tracking — read your time entries, projects, workspaces, and goals from Toggl Track.

endpoints.name: get_me
endpoints.description: Get the current Toggl user's profile including their name, email, timezone, and default workspace ID. Use this to look up the default workspace before querying projects or time entries.

endpoints.name: list_workspaces
endpoints.description: List all Toggl workspaces the current user has access to. Returns workspace IDs and names needed for project and time entry queries.

endpoints.name: list_projects
endpoints.description: List projects in a Toggl workspace. Use this to find project IDs when the user asks about tracked time per project, or to show what projects exist in their workspace.

parameters.name: workspace_id
parameters.description: The numeric workspace ID. Use toggl_list_workspaces to find it.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Filter by active status. true = active projects only, false = archived only. Omit for all projects.

endpoints.name: list_time_entries
endpoints.description: List Toggl time entries for the current user, optionally filtered by date range. Each entry includes project_name, client_name, and task_name by default (no separate project lookup needed). Use this when the user asks how much time they tracked, what they worked on, or wants a summary of logged hours per project or period. Returns up to 1000 entries; narrow the range for large datasets.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start of the date range in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD or full datetime). Defaults to 9 days ago when omitted.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End of the date range in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD or full datetime). Defaults to today when omitted.

parameters.name: meta
parameters.description: When true (default), each entry includes resolved names: project_name, client_name, and task_name. Set to false to get only raw IDs.

endpoints.name: get_current_timer
endpoints.description: Get the Toggl timer that is currently running, if any. Use this when the user asks 'what am I tracking right now?' or 'is my Toggl timer running?'.

endpoints.name: list_goals
endpoints.description: List time-tracking goals for a Toggl workspace. Goals have a target duration, a recurrence period (daily/weekly/monthly), and can be scoped to specific projects, clients, tags, or the whole workspace. Use this when the user asks about their Toggl targets, goals, or time budgets at a workspace level.

parameters.name: workspace_id
parameters.description: The numeric workspace ID. Use toggl_list_workspaces to find it.
